articles.title: REPLAY: Press briefing by US Defense Secretary
articles.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Operation Epic Fury has achieved a decisive result in just weeks, focused on preventing Iran from developing nuclear weapons. He noted the mission is entering a new phase, giving Iran the chance to pursue a “good and wise” peace deal, while emphasising the strength of the U.S. naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, soon to be reinforced by a second aircraft carrier.

articles.title: Iranian foreign minister heads to Pakistan, signaling a possible revival of peace talks
articles.description: A top Iranian official is heading to Pakistan, raising the prospect of a new round of peace talks with the U.S.

articles.title: The blockade that couldn’t hold: Iran’s Phantom tankers buy time as Washington runs out of moves
articles.description: The blockade that was supposed to choke Iran is springing leaks everywhere. “The Blockade That Couldn’t Hold: Iran’s Phantom Tankers Buy Time as Washington Runs Out of Moves” tracks how Iranian oil is still slipping out to sea, even as U.S. warships ring the Gulf and Donald Trump vows to seal every route. Using dark fleets, switched‐off transponders, offshore transfers and shadowy flags of convenience, Tehran’s so‐called “phantom tankers” are buying the regime both time and hard cash.

articles.title: 'Giving up all my positions in AAP': Rajya Sabha MP Sandeep Pathak announces decision to join BJP
articles.description: In a significant political development, Rajya Sabha MP Sandeep Pathak announced his departure from the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) after a decade, citing disillusionment with the party's direction. He declared his intention to join the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP).

articles.title: '50 MLAs May Switch': Punjab Congress Chief Warns AAP Of More Defections After MPs Join BJP
articles.description: Warring said the move by Raghav Chadha and six other AAP MPs to align with the BJP reflected deeper structural weaknesses within the party.

articles.title: PMC’s repair of flyover set for demolition in a year faces opposition ire
Netanyahu says he was successfully treated for prostate cancer
articles.description: Netanyahu, 76, said that he had delayed the release of his annual medical report by two months to prevent Iran from spreading "false propaganda against Israel".

articles.title: How Raghav Chadha, Sandeep Pathak, Ashok Mittal Exit Triggers AAP Crisis
articles.description: In a major political setback for Arvind Kejriwal’s Aam Aadmi Party, seven Members of Parliament have resigned from the party and announced their decision to join the Bharatiya Janata Party. The move signals a significant internal rupture within AAP, raising serious questions over party unity and leadership. The mass exit, led by senior leaders, is being seen as one of the biggest political blows to the party in recent times, with implications for its strength in the Rajya Sabha and its broader national ambitions.

articles.title: 'Brutally beaten' by Kejriwal's aide, says Swati Maliwal after quitting party with 6 AAP Rajya Sabha MPs
articles.description: Beyond the allegation of assault, Swati Maliwal also claimed she faced sustained intimidation.

articles.title: Mamata slams Modi over Jadavpur University remarks, says they undermine premier institute
articles.description: West Bengal Election 2026: Mamata Banerjee hits back at PM Modi for calling Jadavpur University a symbol of anarchy, defending student protests as democracy.

articles.title: $400,000 Maduro bet: How a US special forces soldier landed in legal trouble
articles.description: The case has quickly drawn global attention, not just for the scale of the alleged misconduct but for what it reveals about the vulnerabilities emerging at the intersection of national security and decentralised finance.

articles.title: Kerala HC seeks govt reply on PIL alleging cruelty at cattle markets
articles.description: The petition has further alleged that cattle markets in the state are operating in violation of the advisory on 'Livestock in the Event of Heat Wave Situation' issued by the Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

articles.title: Glamourising The Gangster? Why 'Lawrence of Punjab' Sparked A Row And Has Now Been Banned
articles.description: The gangster's own family, politicians, police, and even the state government, slammed the OTT series for potentially glorifying criminality and fueling gang culture

articles.title: Amit Shah Targets Left Rule Over Kolkata ‘Slum City’ Remark, TMC Hits Back
articles.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah has targeted the Left’s governance in West Bengal, alleging that its long rule contributed to Kolkata’s decline and its “slum city” image. The remarks, made during an election rally, have triggered a strong response from the Trinamool Congress.The TMC rejected the statement, calling it an insult to Kolkata and accusing the BJP of distorting the city’s identity for political purposes.Responding sharply, TMC MP Derek O’Brien said, “How dare you?” and criticised the remark as disrespectful.The incident has intensified the political confrontation between the BJP and TMC as campaigning gathers momentum in the state.

articles.title: AAP candidate injured in firing in Gujarat's Una, party blames BJP
articles.description: AAP has alleged that its candidate for local body polls in Gujarat's Una, Ajay, was injured in a firing. Party leaders Gopal Rai and Isudan Gadhvi have slammed the BJP, accusing them of a 'bloody game' and politics of fear to win polls.

articles.title: Man Who ‘Deliberately Infected Victims With HIV’ Gets Life Sentence
articles.description: Court hears man deliberately targeted vulnerable men and boys, leaving victims with lifelong trauma and illness

articles.title: Trump’s Secret Rant On ‘Keystone Kash’ EXPOSED After VIRAL Beer-Chugging Video | WATCH
articles.description: President Trump is reportedly unhappy with his FBI Chief Kash Patel after a viral locker room video showed him celebrating Team USA’s win by chugging beers. While Trump publicly defended Patel, a CNN report claims he privately criticised the incident and the backlash it triggered. With growing scrutiny and a $250M lawsuit already in play, the controversy continues to escalate.#trump #kashpatel #fbi #cnn #teamusa #usahockeyteam #theatlantic #donaldtrump #viralvideo #lockerroom #fbi chief

articles.title: ‘I feel like I’m starting over’: Woman opens up on life in India 6 months after leaving the US
articles.description: A woman who moved back to India after 17 years in the US shared how the shift felt both fulfilling and emotionally difficult.

articles.title: Live-in secret, marriage promise & pregnancy: Why Delhi High Court refuses pre-arrest bail in ‘false promise’ case
articles.description: A single-judge Bench of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma declined relief to the applicant, observing that the prosecutrix appeared to have entered into the relationship “under a misconception of facts” arising from the promise of marriage extended to her.

articles.title: 'What mistake did I commit?' Pappu Yadav refuses to apologise for remarks on women
articles.description: Independent MP Pappu Yadav defends his statements on the Women's Reservation Bill. He asserts his commitment to protecting women entering politics. Yadav alleges exploitation of young girls by leaders and capitalists. He claims his remarks highlight the struggles women face in the political arena. The Bihar State Women's Commission has sought an explanation for his offensive statements.

articles.title: Mark Ruffalo slams paramount-warner bros. $78 billion merger: “Don’t trust empty promises from billionaires, it will be horrible for workers"
articles.description: Mark Ruffalo opposes Paramount-Warner merger, warning it harms workers, reduces competition, raises subscription costs, and concentrates media power dangerously

articles.title: West Asia crisis, Straits of Hormuz blockade to figure in Heads of Mission conference next week
articles.description: PM Modi will address the Indian envoys on April 30 with minister Jaishankar, NSA Doval and CDS Chauhan being the other speakers.

articles.title: Jackky Bhagnani Calls Marriage With Rakul Preet Singh a ‘Situationship’—Here’s Why
articles.description: Jackky Bhagnani stated why he referred to his marriage to Rakul Preet Singh as a "situationship". He emphasised their openness, independence, and effective communication in their marriage.

articles.title: ‘Smacks Of Ulterior Motives’: Congress Hits Back At EC Notice Over Kharge Calling PM Modi 'Terrorist'
articles.description: Congress criticizes Election Commission notice to Mallikarjun Kharge over terrorist remark, alleges procedural lapses, bias, and seeks more time and a personal hearing

articles.description: On Thursday, Trump shared a strongly worded letter on birthright citizenship, which targeted immigration and hiring in the American tech sector.

articles.title: Iran refutes US claims of internal division, asserts national unity
articles.description: Iran's government refuted US claims of internal division, with leaders posting unified messages on X. Parliament Speaker MB Ghalibaf denied labels of 'hardliner' or 'moderate,' stressing unity under the Supreme Leader.

articles.title: Trump's post on India, immigrants 'disgraceful': Raja Krishnamoorthi
articles.description: Democratic Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi and House Democrats have strongly criticised Donald Trump for amplifying a 'racist' social media post attacking India, immigrants, and birthright citizenship, calling his rhetoric 'disgraceful'.

articles.title: PM Modi on the Hooghly: Pledges commitment to West Bengal's future
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited Kolkata, spending time on the Hooghly River and meeting locals. He also addressed an election rally, calling for a 'storm of change' and criticising the ruling Trinamool Congress on women's rights.

articles.title: Instagram user's 'jaldi aa jaiye' message gets a prompt reply from Amit Shah in Bengal
articles.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah's social media interaction with a supporter waiting for his roadshow in West Bengal went viral. Shah, who had posted a sunset video with a swipe at the ruling TMC, apologized for the delay to a user waiting in the heat. He later held the roadshow, highlighting public sentiment against TMC's alleged atrocities.

articles.description: Kutta sexual assault case triggers concerns on unlicensed homestays

articles.description: Women’s leadership in politics, government, and public life will not only help advance the goal of gender equality — it can also help bring about sustainable and inclusive growth and development

articles.title: Nitish’s heir apparent puts himself ‘under probation’: Why Nishant is in no rush for a title
articles.description: Decision regarding a post will be taken after he completes a yatra across Bihar next month, sources say.

articles.title: Domestic workers can’t claim tenancy rights after tenant’s death: HC
articles.description: The domestic worker was employed as full-time domestic help in 1948 and continued to live in the flat, along with his wife, even after the legal tenant’s death in 1985, the court noted

articles.title: Israel says it struck Hezbollah missile launcher soon after ceasefire with Lebanon
articles.description: Israel's military struck a missile launcher in Lebanon after it fired rockets into Israel. Hezbollah claimed responsibility for the rocket attack, stating it was retaliation for an Israeli strike on Yater. Earlier, an Israeli airstrike killed three people in Nabatieh. The Israeli military reported killing three militants who targeted an Israeli warplane.

articles.title: The newest matchmaker on the scene, the Japanese government
articles.description: By offering financial support, the state tacitly admits that the obstacles to romance today extend well beyond individual choice. Still, if a modest subsidy can nudge someone to a first date, perhaps it is money not entirely misspent

articles.title: Mojtaba ‘Sidelined’, IRGC Generals ‘TAKE OVER’ Iran In Huge Power Shake-up? BOMBSHELL Reveal
articles.description: Iran has a new Supreme Leader, but does he have the power? A bombshell report from The New York Times reveals that Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei is recovering from severe burns and multiple surgeries, leaving him unable to exercise the centralized authority his father once held. Instead, a "board" of IRGC generals is now calling the shots on everything from missile strikes to ceasefire talks. Communicating only through handwritten notes and hidden from the public eye, Mojtaba’s reign is looking less like a supreme leadership and more like a military regency.#iran #khamenei #breakingnews #irgc #tehran #middleeast

articles.title: After defeat of delimitation bill, South India must confront inequalities within
articles.description: Southern states cannot continue to concentrate power in the hands of men

articles.title: ‘IRON UNITY’: Iran Leaders SHUT DOWN Trump’s ‘CATS VS DOGS Fight’ Claim In FIERY RETALIATION
articles.description: "We are all revolutionaries." In a rare and powerful show of institutional unity, Iran’s President, Parliament Speaker, and Judiciary Chief have wiped out the Western narrative of internal political rifts. Responding directly to White House claims of a "battle between pragmatists and hardliners," Tehran’s top brass issued a synchronized message: One God, one nation, one leader. As the U.S. touts the "success" of a $500-million-a-day blockade, Iran is hitting back with a single, uncompromising voice.#iran #pezeshkian #trump #geopolitics #breakingnews #tehran #whitehouse #economy #blockade #nationalunity

articles.title: HC seeks govt reply on urea shortage, booking app woes
articles.description: Hyderabad: Telangana high court on Thursday sought response from the state govt on allegations of urea shortage and problems faced by farmers in using.

articles.title: ‘If Iran doesn’t make a deal, I will finish it’: Trump’s ULTIMATUM as Pak talks fall into disarray
articles.description: Donald Trump escalates pressure on Iran, saying “Iran is on the clock” while warning he will “finish it” if no deal is reached. Peace talks in Pakistan remain uncertain after failing to secure a breakthrough, with tensions rising amid ceasefire extensions and military threats. The standoff highlights growing geopolitical stakes as Trump signals no urgency while keeping military options on the table.

articles.title: Trump Says Iran Deal Possible ‘Right Now’, But Wants Permanent Agreement
articles.description: Donald Trump says a long lasting Iran deal is possible, ties it to control of the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: ‘Completed reunification of Ukrainian and Russian children with their families’: Melania announces
articles.description: Melania Trump highlights efforts to reunite Ukrainian and Russian children separated by war, calling it a key humanitarian mission. Her initiative has helped return multiple children to their families through ongoing coordination between both nations. The reunification effort remains a major global issue amid the Russia-Ukraine conflict, with more cases still being processed.

articles.title: WB polls: High voter turnout signals sunset of TMC's politics, says BJP
articles.description: BJP's Nitin Nabin held a roadshow in Kolkata, stating high voter turnout in the West Bengal polls signals a political shift against the TMC. He called it the "sunset of TMC's politics" and said people have voted against the "reign of goons".

articles.title: State may witness close contests in many constituencies
articles.description: State elections may see tighter races due to C. Joseph Vijay's influence, shifting dynamics from bipolar to three-cornered contests.

articles.title: China’s Satellite Surge: The New Space Threat to US Power in the Middle East
articles.description: Rising tensions in the Middle East, following US and Israeli strikes on Iran, have spotlighted China’s expanding commercial satellite network.
